message:
feat(ui): add Stripe-level UI/UX polish phase 1

- Add animated active state indicator to Nav with spring physics
- Create Tabs sliding indicator using Framer Motion layoutId
- Build mobile bottom navigation with iOS safe area support
- Add SkeletonContainer and SkeletonFade for loading transitions
- Create EmptyState component with search/filter/content/error variants
- Fix bundle ID validation (hundred-to-ten-filter)

Components added:
- BottomNav.tsx - Mobile-only bottom navigation bar
- EmptyState.tsx - Reusable empty state with animated entrance

Components enhanced:
- Nav.tsx - Desktop underline + mobile pill active indicators
- tabs.tsx - Spring-animated sliding background indicator
- skeleton.tsx - Cross-fade container for loading states
- Footer.tsx - Added className prop support

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
